name: Representation-Based Exploration for Language Models: From Test-Time to Post-Training

description: arXiv:2510.11686v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) promises to expand the capabilities of language models, but it is unclear if current RL techniques promote the discovery of novel behaviors, or simply sharpen those already present in the base model. In this paper, we investigate the value of deliberate exploration -- explicitly incentivizing the model to disc...
author: Jens Tuyls, Dylan J. Foster, Akshay Krishnamurthy, Jordan T. Ash
